description: Google Play EMM API is Google’s legacy Android Enterprise interface for enterprise mobility management solutions to manage apps, users, devices, and managed Google Play workflows. Google no longer accepts new registrations for Play EMM API integrations, but existing validated EMMs continue to be supported.
summary: androidenterprise.googleapis.com exposes one documented HTTP API: the Google Play EMM API; no GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surfaced from public docs.
